name: emlShortName
displayName: IPT short name for the URL and reference

name: DatasetPurpose
displayName: Purpose and objectives of the dataset

name: emlTaxonomicCoverageDescription
displayName: A description of the range of taxa addressed in the data set or collection

name: emlTaxonomicCoverageClassification
displayName: Information about the range of taxa addressed in the data set or collection

name: emlTaxonomicCoverageTaxonRankName
displayName: The name of the taxonomic rank for which the Taxon rank value is provided

name: emlTaxonomicCoverageCommonName
displayName: Specification of applicable common names. These common names may be general descriptions of a group of organisms if appropriate

name: emlTaxonomicCoverageTaxonId
displayName: The identifier for this taxon from an authority, such as the Gbif backbone, ITIS or USDA Plant Database. Using an external system identifer allows referencing of additional information about a taxon, e.g., authoritative names, historical synonyms, published descriptions or rank hierarchies

name: emlTemporalCoverage
displayName: Group of variable for describing the temporal coverage of the dataset

name: temporalCoverageType
displayName: Type of temporal coverage (single date, range, formation period)

name: TCsimpleDate
displayName: single date corresponding to temporal coverage

name: TCinitialDate
displayName: Initial date of a date range

name: TCfinalDate
displayName: Final date of a date range

name: TCformationPeriod
blockURI: Fill when type is formation period

name: emlMethod
displayName: Group of variable for method description

name: emlMethodsSampling
displayName: Description of sampling procedures including the geographic, temporal and taxonomic coverage of the study

name: emlMethodQualityControl
displayName: Description of one step of the methodology

name: emlMethodStep
displayName: Group of variable for describing each method step

name: emlMethodStepNumber
displayName: Number for ordered steps in the methodology

name: emlMethodStepDescription
displayName: Description of one step of the methodology

name: collectionData
displayName: Group of variable for describing collections

name: biologicalBiases
displayName: Description of potential biases for the dataset
